All right, so now we are going to set some default reminders and settings in acuity. So once they schedule their appointment in acuity, they'll be getting reminders from either many chat or from front and agile. However, if they opt in to many chat, and there might be, there could be, if there is a problem with their emails not matching or something like that. For whatever reason, if they're not receiving a notification from many chat or not checking it, we definitely still want to hit them with a couple text message reminders and email reminders about their appointment. So here's how we do that. You'll start off in this basic page here on the front where it says business settings and you're going to click on email settings. Okay, and under email settings, we are going to click on reminder. So there'll be a standard reminder that says 24 hours before. Yours will say 24 hours before email and text. Okay, or it might say 24 hours before email. So the first thing that we want to do is we want to switch the text one. It only allows you to send out one text reminder. The other two reminders can be emails. So the first one we want to switch, because we have the text in there, is we want to switch this to three, it should say 24, and then hit save settings. And then you want to check the box that says send a text message reminder to clients and then click save settings. And then you want to check the button that says send this reminder to clients only and then click save settings. So you want to make sure that you have this all saved. Now the text message that it's going to send is going to be the subject of your email. So it will say something like appointment reminder and then it'll say the appointment type, the time of the appointment, and the day of the appointment, and that's it. We're going to change that a little bit. So what we want it to say is instead of the appointment type, we want to erase that. Or instead of it saying appointment confirmation, which is what it'll say, we want to erase that and we want it to type in your. So it'll say your and underneath, you can see the example, it'll say your six week challenge orientation, which will be the appointment type that we are selecting this for. Or it will be basically whatever. So if you use this one, it'll say basically your and then whatever appointment type you have them clicked on. So mine will say six week challenge if they're in the challenge. If you have somebody in a way out, it'll say your challenge way out. It'll say whatever the appointment type that they booked for. And then it'll say is on and then the date and the time and that is it. So we want to select after the time we put an exclamation mark and then we want to type in the words see you soon or something cool like that with an emoji because they're getting text this. Okay. So after you have the, it only allows 150 characters, just so you know, after you have the correct what you want message and it will display down here exactly what it's going to text them, then scroll down here and hit save template. Okay. So now we have this saved. Make sure you hit save settings after everything. I've had this get erased a couple of times because I forgot to hit save settings. So after you type that save settings. And this is what the email is going to look like. Don't worry about these cancel or change appointments. We disable that in the next step. So this is the text that they will get and they're going to get this one three hours before their appointments. Okay. Now we have the opportunity to add two more emails. So we'll add a bit emails are not nearly as checked as the appointment reminders. So we'll put one at 24 hours and one at one hour. Keep in mind, they will nor they will be normally in your many chat campaign getting amazing testimonials and videos. This is just a backup in case something doesn't work. They'll still get some reminders. So now what we want to do is there's a button at the top that says add a reminder. Okay. Mine is gone because I used all three, but yours will be able to say add a reminder and then we will select email and it will be 24 hours. So you type in 24 if it doesn't say that and then you will click on send this reminder to email or set this reminder to clients only. So make sure you have this and then click save settings. As you can see, it doesn't give you the option to send another text and then make sure that your subject says the exact same thing as the first one. Okay. If you want to change it to something different, go ahead, but I have mine saying the exact same thing as the first one. Your challenge at this day and time. So you assume. Okay. And then we create one more and it'll be an email. Oh, see. This is what I'm talking about. Save settings. If you touch anything, you have to save settings. Then we have to go. Okay. Then we have to go to one hour before. So it will, it automatically pops up as 24 hours before just when you type in the one here and hit save settings, it'll update the title up here. So now we do the one hour appointment reminder and we send this to the client and we make sure that the email subject is going to be what we want it to be. Okay. And then it will just give them their basic information. We hit save template. We make sure that we hit save settings and now it is set. It is going to remind them via email and text three hours before 24 hours and one hour before. So now your appointment reminders in acuity are set. Okay. So they will either be getting them in many chat if they're a subscriber or they'll be getting them in agile if they are, if they decided not to subscribe to many chat for whatever reason. So they'll be getting them through agile in front in one of those campaigns. This is simply in addition to those and it is great for a backup in case the email address does not match up with what they gave us in acuity and what they gave us in many chat. Then it can't find the right person. It almost never happens, but we always want to have a fallback. So that's what this is. Now we are going to go to availability and calendars and we want to click on scheduling limits. So here is where we set the limits that our schedule appears. So we want to have appointments be able to book zero hours in advance. That way they can always get in. If they want to, if they see your ad, they click on it, they go through and they want to be to your gym and an hour. You want them to be able to do that. And then right now we have it set at four days in the future. I do that because that way they can still schedule over the weekend. If you want to tighten it up to three days or two days, that's completely up to you. I would not recommend going past four days or your show percentage will go down because they just booked so far in the future. The next thing that we want to do is we want to, where it says display start times for appointments every 30 minutes. We want to switch this to auto. That way it is going to be dependent on the appointment type. It'll be the same length on the calendar as that appointment type is. So it can't get weird. So we switch that to auto. And then finally we are going to allow clients to reschedule their own appointments. So you will click on allow clients to reschedule their own appointments because they will need to do that with our reschedule sequence in many chat. So once you have all of those changes made, just go ahead and click save settings. Do not allow clients to cancel their own appointments. They can do that through many chat, but allow them to reschedule. And now that we have saved our settings, we can move on to the next part.
